releases.title: v3.4.17
releases.summary: This release adds explicit unit metadata to native Art dimensions. Art height and width can now carry inches or centimeters without changing the existing numeric dimension fields or converting existing records.

releases.title: v3.4.16
releases.summary: This release normalizes signature proof upload and removal around shared `signature_records`. Art and media drawers now use the same per-signature proof workflow while existing object-level proof fields and older compatibility endpoints remain intact.

releases.title: v3.4.15
releases.summary: This release brings shared multi-signature provenance management into Art and media drawers. Users can add, edit, archive, and promote signature records without relying on API-only workflows or overwriting the primary-signature compatibility shortcuts.

releases.title: v3.4.14
releases.summary: This release lets native Art records track physical artwork dimensions and framed status as first-class Art metadata, keeping those fields out of Collectibles while preserving event purchase linking.

releases.title: v3.4.13
releases.summary: This release lets Art and media records carry multiple shared signature provenance records while preserving the existing single-primary compatibility fields used by older forms, imports, and title endpoints.

releases.title: v3.4.12
releases.summary: This release brings the event autograph linking contract into the Event drawer. Autograph artifacts can now capture signer details, show their event-side provenance, and link directly to canonical Art or media signature records from the UI.

releases.title: v3.4.11
releases.summary: This release connects event-captured autographs to the shared signature provenance model introduced for Art and media. Events remain the capture/history surface, while Art and media records remain the canonical signed-object evidence surface.

releases.title: v3.4.10
releases.summary: This release completes the next shared signature provenance slice by giving Art the same proof-image upload and removal path already available to media signing proofs. Art proof files now update the shared primary signature record directly, while media proof removal keeps the legacy media field and shared signature record aligned.

releases.title: v3.4.9
releases.summary: This release introduces one shared signature provenance contract for signed collection objects. Art now records richer signature details through the shared model, while existing media title signature fields continue to work as compatibility projections onto the same foundation.

releases.title: v3.4.8
releases.summary: This release gives Art and Collectibles a shared `Fandom / Franchise` metadata field so source, fandom, franchise, and universe context can live beside the item without becoming object taxonomy. Art medium/type and Collectibles category stay focused on what the object is, while fandom context becomes searchable metadata across both libraries.
